summary: Google Sign-In Integration & Auth Modal Testing - All 13 tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Home page loads correctly with hero, booking form, destinations, 2) Auth modal opens on Sign in click, 3) Google 'Continue with Google' button visible on Sign-in tab (GIS library loads dynamically), 4) Google 'Continue with Google' button visible on Sign-up tab, 5) Classic email/password login shows 'Identifiants incorrects' error for invalid credentials, 6) Sign-up form validation shows French error messages (7 fields validated), 7) Forgot password flow shows reset form with email input, 8) Google Maps autocomplete works on Home page (Paris CDG selection), 9) Booking form on /transfert-aeroport-paris works with Google Maps autocomplete, 10) Backend endpoint POST /api/proxy/auth/google-login exists and returns appropriate error for invalid token, 11) No Google Maps script in page source (lazy-loads via PlacesAutocomplete), 12) PostHog/Yandex/GA scripts deferred via loadAnalytics function, 13) Mobile responsive (390px) - auth modal works with Google button visible.

test_credentials.note: Fleet credentials (Nandetiri1@gmail.com / 12345678) actually work for client login too - this may be intentional cross-auth

context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Sign-In integration verified: 1) GIS library (accounts.google.com/gsi/client) loads dynamically when AuthModal mounts, 2) Google button renders via google.accounts.id.renderButton() with French locale, 3) Backend /api/proxy/auth/google-login proxies to api.zont.cab/api/Client/googleLogin, 4) loginDirect method in AuthContext sets user state directly for Google auth. Note: Full Google OAuth flow cannot be tested in automation (requires real user interaction with Google consent screen). Previous PageSpeed optimizations (iterations 51-52) still working: lazy-load Google Maps, deferred analytics, cache headers.
